channel.title: grad school on Moorsalin's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in grad school on Moorsalin's Blog

item.title: Grad school in review
item.description: Finally, after four long years I have completed my Masters program in computer science. What have I learned? Let us have a look: Courses I completed CS 6262 Network Security CS 6035 Introduction to Information Security CS 6300 Software Development Process CS 6250 Computer Networks CS 7646 Machine Learning for Trading CS 6340 Software Analysis CS 6601 Artificial Intelligence CS 6400 Database Systems Concepts and Design CS 6238 Secure Computer Systems CS 6515 Intro to Graduate Algorithms I suppose I should give summaries of the above courses.
